title: The Secret Heart
writer: Whitfield Cook, Anne Morrison Chapin, Rose Franken
actors: Claudette Colbert, Walter Pidgeon, June Allyson
plot: Brillant pianist Larry Addams allows his frustrated ambitions to ruin his life and commits suicide, leaving his wife, Lee, and two small children, Penny and Chase, under the stigma of disgrace. Lee takes over and devotes her life ...
